subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Husayn! As I set about to pen this letter, I sought to find a befitting title and appellation that would serve as its address [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبدالحسین چون بنگارش این نامه پرداختم تحری نعت و لقبی نمودم که عنوان خطاب
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @service to others; to the Cause of God
